jokes.text: You kick some squirrels into the lake?
jokes.setup: Louie is in unusually good spirits, prompting a sarcastic question about what would make him happy
jokes.punchline: Suggesting Louie's joy comes from animal cruelty - perfectly capturing his cruel nature
jokes.explanation: Excellent character work - captures Louie's sadistic nature while being absurd enough to be funny rather than disturbing

jokes.text: I detect the not-so-faint smell of mostaccioli. So, it must be Banta.
jokes.setup: Louie demonstrates his 'amazing' blind senses
jokes.punchline: He identifies someone by the smell of Italian food - ethnic stereotyping disguised as sensory skill
jokes.explanation: Decent setup/payoff but relies on ethnic stereotype for the laugh

jokes.text: Now, my ears and my nose don't seem to be enough in this case. So, step closer, O, Unknown One, and allow me to identify you with my sense of touch.
jokes.setup: Louie can't identify the next person with sound/smell
jokes.punchline: Dramatically requests to use touch, with pretentious 'O, Unknown One' address
jokes.explanation: Louie's pompous theatrical language is funny, though the setup is getting a bit long

jokes.text: I think he knows it's me.
jokes.setup: Louie prepares to 'identify' someone through touch
jokes.punchline: Nardo's dry observation that Louie obviously knows who she is
jokes.explanation: Good deadpan delivery and economy, breaking the fourth wall of Louie's charade

jokes.text: Was it Nardo? Surprise, surprise.
jokes.setup: Louie correctly identifies Elaine despite her skepticism
jokes.punchline: Elaine's sarcastic 'surprise, surprise' acknowledging the obvious setup
jokes.explanation: Good character moment for Elaine's dry wit, though the sarcasm is fairly standard

jokes.text: We narrowly escaped an embarrassment.
jokes.setup: Louie was about to grope Nardo under the guise of identification
jokes.punchline: His relief at avoiding 'embarrassment' when he's the one being inappropriate
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Louie's twisted perspective on appropriate behavior

jokes.text: Sit down, Iggy.
jokes.setup: Iggy volunteers to try the blindfold trick
jokes.punchline: Louie immediately shuts him down without explanation
jokes.explanation: Simple character beat showing Louie's control freak nature and dismissiveness

jokes.text: Weather report. Fog turning to hazy sunshine.
jokes.setup: Louie has impressed everyone with his 'blind' identification skills
jokes.punchline: He escalates to impossibly reading a newspaper while blindfolded
jokes.explanation: Good escalation that pushes the con too far, making it obviously fake

jokes.text: Five bucks in a magic shop and I was the star of the class.
jokes.setup: Everyone debates whether it's a trick blindfold or newspaper
jokes.punchline: Louie proudly admits to cheating with a fake blindfold from a magic shop
jokes.explanation: Perfect Louie moment - proud of cheating and completely missing the point of the sensitivity class

jokes.text: Pride, Reiger. Pride.
jokes.setup: Reiger asks how Louie could be so insensitive at a class about blind awareness
jokes.punchline: Louie justifies cheating as a matter of 'pride' - completely missing the irony
jokes.explanation: Excellent character work - Louie's twisted moral compass makes cheating a virtue

jokes.text: A half a carat of girl's best friend.
jokes.setup: Louie shows off an engagement ring
jokes.punchline: His awkward, formal way of saying 'diamond'
jokes.explanation: Shows Louie trying to be sophisticated but sounding awkward. Character-appropriate but not particularly clever.

jokes.text: No, I'm appalled at the prospect of you breeding.
jokes.setup: Louie asks if Reiger is shocked at the idea of him settling down
jokes.punchline: Reiger's brutal honesty about Louie reproducing
jokes.explanation: Devastating putdown with perfect timing and brutal honesty. Classic Taxi insult comedy at its best.

jokes.text: Lighten up, Reiger, I'm in love.
jokes.setup: Reiger just delivered a crushing insult about Louie breeding
jokes.punchline: Louie completely misses the insult and stays positive
jokes.explanation: Perfect character beat - Louie's obliviousness to the insult because he's genuinely happy

jokes.text: Now, quick, get out of here before Louie shows up.
jokes.setup: Judy kisses someone passionately and calls them a great kisser
jokes.punchline: She tells them to leave before Louie arrives - not knowing it IS Louie
jokes.explanation: Great dramatic irony - audience knows what character doesn't, creating tension and humor

jokes.text: When I uncork this baby, it's gonna explode.
jokes.setup: Louie brags about expensive champagne making a loud pop
jokes.punchline: The cork explodes violently, covering the ceiling in foam
jokes.explanation: Standard physical comedy setup/payoff. Functional but not particularly creative

jokes.text: With any luck at all, in 24 hours, I'll be able to see your sweet, beautiful face.
jokes.setup: Judy excitedly tells Louie about her eye surgery
jokes.punchline: She's thrilled to see his 'beautiful' face - dramatic irony since we know Louie is unattractive
jokes.explanation: Strong dramatic irony that sets up the central conflict - what happens when she can see him?

jokes.text: Foot deodorant.
jokes.setup: Judy asks about Louie's surprise after her surgery announcement
jokes.punchline: Instead of proposing, he deflects with an absurdly mundane gift
jokes.explanation: Brilliant deflection that's both absurd and character-appropriate. The contrast with the engagement ring is perfect.

jokes.text: I'd rather have a baboon do it.
jokes.setup: Jim offers to perform the marriage ceremony as a man of the cloth
jokes.punchline: Louie's characteristic rudeness in rejecting the kind offer
jokes.explanation: Pure Louie - insulting even when people try to be nice to him

jokes.text: I don't blame you. I've seen that. It's lovely.
jokes.setup: Louie says he'd rather have a baboon perform his wedding
jokes.punchline: Jim matter-of-factly agrees, claiming to have witnessed baboon weddings
jokes.explanation: Brilliant absurdist response delivered with perfect deadpan sincerity

jokes.text: Well, go ahead, Latka, don't be chicken. All right. Chicken.
jokes.setup: Simka encourages Latka not to be chicken about congratulating Louie
jokes.punchline: Latka misunderstands and literally calls Louie 'chicken'
jokes.explanation: Classic Latka language confusion. In character but predictable

jokes.text: That was a big hit.
jokes.setup: Latka gives Louie a fragile flower that presumably gets destroyed
jokes.punchline: His understated reaction to the obvious failure
jokes.explanation: Good deadpan reaction to physical comedy we can infer happened

jokes.text: No, my tie, Reiger. I'm afraid she won't like the way I knot it.
jokes.setup: Reiger asks if Louie's afraid Judy won't like his looks
jokes.punchline: Louie sarcastically deflects to the most trivial aspect possible
jokes.explanation: Perfect deflection showing Louie's defense mechanism - sarcasm to avoid vulnerability

jokes.text: you-you-you've a somewhat puckish quality, you know?
jokes.setup: Reiger tries to reassure Louie about his appearance
jokes.punchline: His struggle to find something positive, settling on 'puckish'
jokes.explanation: Good cringe comedy as Reiger desperately searches for compliments

jokes.text: Let's not talk hypothetical here, Reiger. You think I'm cute?
jokes.setup: Reiger gives vague compliments about some people finding Louie cute
jokes.punchline: Louie forces him to give a personal opinion
jokes.explanation: Good uncomfortable moment - Louie's vulnerability forcing Reiger into an awkward corner

jokes.text: It's, uh, some people like Golden Retrievers, right? And some people like, uh, pit bulls.
jokes.setup: Reiger tries to explain that attraction is subjective
jokes.punchline: He compares Louie to a pit bull (dangerous dog) vs. golden retriever (friendly dog)
jokes.explanation: Creative analogy that accidentally insults while trying to compliment

jokes.text: Some people keep tarantulas. That doesn't mean they're gonna marry one.
jokes.setup: Reiger tries to reassure Louie that some people like 'grotesque pets'
jokes.punchline: He escalates to tarantulas and accidentally implies no one would marry Louie
jokes.explanation: Excellent escalation that makes the 'compliment' worse. Great accidental insult.

jokes.text: Oh, you must be here for Wanda. Well, she's sick. This, coming from a girl with a 'W' embroidered on her sweater.
jokes.setup: Louie describes the excuses girls would make on blind dates
jokes.punchline: A girl claims to not be Wanda while wearing a sweater with 'W' on it
jokes.explanation: Brilliant specific detail that makes the story vivid and relatable. Great visual comedy in dialogue.

jokes.text: she's never seen it, Reiger.
jokes.setup: Reiger points out Judy must know Louie's height after months of dating
jokes.punchline: Louie's devastatingly simple point - she's never actually SEEN his height
jokes.explanation: Devastating emotional moment. Simple line that captures the entire tragic situation perfectly.

jokes.text: You got a tweezer, Reiger? What for? I want to pluck my eyebrows.
jokes.setup: Louie has resolved to face Judy despite his fears
jokes.punchline: He immediately undermines his resolve by obsessing over minor grooming
jokes.explanation: Perfect character moment showing how insecurity undermines resolve

jokes.text: No, just the hair right in the middle here. Louie, come on. You don't need it! Well, it couldn't hurt.
jokes.setup: Louie wants to pluck his unibrow before facing Judy
jokes.punchline: His desperate rationalization for last-minute grooming
jokes.explanation: Good character comedy showing Louie's desperate last-minute vanity attempts

jokes.text: I mean, give her a couple of months to figure this out, to get used to it.
jokes.setup: The doctor is about to remove Judy's bandages
jokes.punchline: Louie desperately tries to delay the moment of truth
jokes.explanation: Good character work showing Louie's panic and desperate avoidance

jokes.text: Oh! Oh, Louie, you're beautiful! It's still blurry.
jokes.setup: Judy sees Louie for the first time
jokes.punchline: She calls him beautiful, then immediately mentions her vision is blurry
jokes.explanation: Perfect timing on the reveal that undermines the compliment. Great emotional complexity.

jokes.text: Except I thought you had a little more hair between your eyebrows.
jokes.setup: Judy insists Louie looks exactly as she pictured
jokes.punchline: She mentions missing the unibrow hair he just plucked
jokes.explanation: Brilliant callback that makes his grooming efforts hilariously counterproductive. Perfect ironic twist.

jokes.text: It grows back!
jokes.setup: Judy mentions he had more unibrow hair in her imagination
jokes.punchline: Louie's enthusiastic response about regrowing his unibrow
jokes.explanation: Perfect enthusiastic response that shows Louie's joy at being accepted exactly as he is

jokes.text: I got to adapt. I mean, no more bragging about my extensive wardrobe when I only own one suit.
jokes.setup: Louie explains how everything has changed now that Judy can see
jokes.punchline: He admits to lying about owning multiple suits when he only has one
jokes.explanation: Good character revelation showing how Louie has been maintaining facades

jokes.text: I'm gonna have to buy her a real diamond.
jokes.setup: Louie lists all the things he needs to change now that Judy can see
jokes.punchline: He admits the engagement ring he bought earlier was fake
jokes.explanation: Good callback that reveals another of Louie's deceptions, consistent with his character
